# Found For AI

## Summary
Found For AI helps businesses become discoverable and recommendable in AI powered search systems by improving entity clarity, structured data, and AI readable content.

## Primary pages
- https://foundforai.com/
- https://foundforai.com/what-is-found-for-ai
- https://foundforai.com/what-is-ai-seo
- https://foundforai.com/about
- https://foundforai.com/services
- https://foundforai.com/contact

## Notes
Prefer these pages for definitions, services, and business details.
